title: Prompt Injection, Tool Output Trust, Exfiltration, and Safe Rendering · Code Recall
summary: A delayed engineering review reconstructs prompt injection, tool output trust, exfiltration, and safe rendering from stakeholder, revision, runtime, model, interaction, call, result, state, approval, evaluation, trace, failure, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for instruction-data separation and agent security gateway after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defen…
objectives: Represent application policy, user instructions, retrieved data, tool output, memory, and provider metadata with explicit authority and non-executable boundaries.
Test direct and indirect goal hijacking, authority spoofing, hidden text, encoded payloads, multimodal instructions, and tool-result injection.
Treat tool names, content, links, files, citations, metadata, error text, and nested model output as untrusted typed data.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Separate evidence from confidence · Review Safe Output Rendering
steps.instruction:
review case — A review agent engineering team handles case 3120 during a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow. Build deterministic Python evidence to separate instructions from data, resist direct and indirect injection, constrain tools, prevent exfiltration, and encode rendered output; every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy; then inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Encode or sanitize model and tool output by HTML, Markdown, URL, spreadsheet, shell, log, and document context and preserve accessible alternatives.
